condition: earningsGapResidual(theta=0.75, market-neutral ATR gap residual = name-gap minus same-night SPY-gap, both ATR-normalised) [inline script]
mode: 300-sym sanity universe (full ~3,700-sym OOMs the 20GB heap, per condition-earningsgap FIRED events). Reduced universe => wide SEs, anti-conservative: a pass is NOT full validation, a clean fail is a STRONG fail.
spec: Successor to the REJECTED price-gap proxy (condition-earningsgap, design-time kill 2026-06-09 — regime sign-flip = beta-delivery). residualAtr = (open[g]-close[g-1])/atr[g-1] - (spyOpen[g]-spyClose[g-1])/spyAtr[g-1]; SPY prev-day anchored to NAME prev.date; null-guard every SPY lookup. Same gap-day timing (BeforeMarket->first session on/after reportedDate, AfterMarket/null->first strictly after), year>1900 + countTradingDaysBetween<=3 guards, entryDelayDays=1 (isolates POST-ENTRY drift), horizons 5/20/40, window 2000-01-01..2021-01-01 (ADR 0007 cap). Sweep theta center 0.75 +-0.5 -> {0.25,0.75,1.25} (residual mechanically smaller than raw gap). close-near-high EXCLUDED (re-imports the momentum we are removing). any-earnings-no-gap reference arm. Screen BOTH ways: run A no vol gate (this request); run B relVol>=1.5 (pead.earnings-gap-residual.volgate.request.json).
pass_bar: 20d post-entry meanLift >= +1.5% AND >= 2x clustered SE; NO SPY-regime 20d sign-flip with flat-tape meanLift >= +1.0% (the decisive hurdle — flat was -0.38% for the dead gap); surprise-magnitude monotonicity across {0.25,0.75,1.25} (1.25 cell not negative); horizon non-decay (20d>=5d, 40d>=20d-0.5%); firing spread across years.
kill_escalate: If the regime sign-flip PERSISTS after neutralisation, the whole price-based proxy class is likely dead -> fall back to EPS-surprise-gated residual (EPS confirms SIGN only: residualAtr>=theta AND surprisePercentage>0; never threshold EPS magnitude — S4 restatement risk).

condition: earningsGapResidual(theta sweep 0.25/0.75/1.25, market-neutral ATR gap residual) [inline script]
mode: RUN A (no vol gate); 300-sym sanity universe
quant_signoff: APPROVE (quant-analyst 2026-06-09) — no lookahead, guards complete, unit-beta ATR residual correct for run-1, SPY anchoring fail-safe

mode: RUN B (relVol>=1.5 confirmation arm); 300-sym sanity universe
note: Run A triggered the KILL (regime sign-flip persisted: 20d down +0.90/flat -0.52/up -0.57). Run B tests whether volume-confirmed surprises are regime-stable.

condition: earningsGapResidual (market-neutral ATR gap residual, theta 0.75+-0.5; arms A no-vol-gate / B relVol>=1.5) [inline script]
mode: REDUCED-UNIVERSE (300-sym sanity; anti-conservative wide SEs => clean fail is STRONG fail)
quant_signoff: APPROVE (quant-analyst 2026-06-09) — script faithful, no lookahead, guards complete, unit-beta ATR residual correct for run-1
step0_cadence: PASS — A 3,093 / B 2,588 signals, present all 21y, well-distributed, signalCount/dateCount ~1.9 (not lumpy). Not cadence-ceiling, not one-tape.
summary: Three binding failures, BOTH arms. (1) DECISIVE KILL: SPY-regime 20d sign-flip PERSISTED after market-neutralisation — flat-tape NEGATIVE (A down +0.90/flat -0.52/up -0.57; B down +1.07/flat -0.20/up -0.89; bar required no-flip & flat>=+1.0%). Edge still confined to down-tape => still reads market direction, not firm surprise. Run B regime spread WIDER than A (vol gate = thinning-not-selecting, not a rescue). (2) 20d headline meanLift NEGATIVE + sub-SE (A -0.13%/-0.46x; B -0.08%/-0.30x; bar +1.5% & 2xSE) — |lift|<SE at every horizon, no detectable edge; horizon non-monotone noise, not slow-diffusion accumulation. (3) theta-1.25 cell NEGATIVE (A -0.121%, B -0.055%) => surprise-magnitude monotonicity fails; sweep coarse (relativeStep 0.67>0.5) so formal ARS inconclusive-by-construction. Jaccard A 0.207 / B 0.173 (distinct sub-population, no regime-orthogonal edge).
new_finding: Explicitly subtracting the same-night SPY-index gap did NOT remove the regime-tertile sign-flip => the beta the earnings gap delivers is NOT the removable same-day single-factor market term. Rules out the OHLCV market-neutral-residual REPAIR PATH, not just one parametrisation.
candidate_impact: KILLS the price-based surprise-proxy CLASS (raw gap + market-neutral residual both dead), NOT the PEAD class. Mechanism (slow diffusion of firm-specific news) untouched. Escalate to EPS-surprise-gated residual (residualAtr>=theta AND surprisePercentage>0; EPS confirms SIGN ONLY — never threshold EPS magnitude, S4 restatement risk) — the LAST price-independent surprise test before abandoning PEADs surprise-proxy axis.
disposition: NOT a firewall death — no config_hash burned, G13 brake NOT engaged. Do NOT iterate this config (no theta/relVol tuning, no bolting a regime gate on = IS-fitting the sign-flip). Class free to pursue successor #2.
